title: Parameter Estimation Path
description: Build fluency in Parameter Estimation inside Statistical Methods by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.
featuredTermTitles: Implicit Maximum Likelihood Estimation (IMLE) Extensions Extensions

steps.title: Maximum Likelihood Estimation (MLE)
steps.summary: A method for estimating the parameters of a model by maximizing the likelihood of the observed data. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Parameter Estimation. Start after Likelihood.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Implicit Maximum Likelihood Estimation (IMLE) Extensions
steps.summary: Implicit Maximum Likelihood Estimation (IMLE) Extensions belongs to the Statistical Methods area of AI/ML, within Parameter Estimation. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Parameter Estimation. Start after Implicit Maximum Likelihood Estimation (IMLE) and Implicit Maximum Likelihood Estimation Extensions. It opens into Implicit Maximum Likelihood Estimation (IMLE) Extensions Extensions Techniques and Implicit Maximum Likelihood Estimation (IMLE) Enhancements Extensions Techniques.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.
